acceptance_criteria.text: Unbound Telegram user sees a guest mode menu and can start a quick card audit from chat.
proof: telegram_bot.py /start now renders guest menu for unbound users
guest callback handlers cover audit/about/bind-help flow
free-text handler for unbound users attempts audit intake directly

acceptance_criteria.text: Incoming map links are normalized and softly validated before audit creation.
proof: services/telegram_lead_intake.py adds extraction, normalization, classification and readable errors
local targeted smoke confirmed supported Yandex, 2GIS and Google business-card URLs
telegram_bot.py audit intake requires exactly one valid normalized card URL
gaps: No broader automated link edge-case suite yet

acceptance_criteria.text: Bound Telegram user gets partnership and feature-request entrypoints, and feature requests persist in DB.
proof: telegram_bot.py main menu now includes partnerships and feature request actions
new botfeaturerequests migration and save_bot_feature_request service persist requests
gaps: No admin UI for browsing these requests in this phase

acceptance_criteria.text: Production backend is updated with the new schema and Telegram bot source.
proof: app and worker are up and localhost health returns 200
Server runtime venv imports updated telegram helpers successfully
gaps: Polling bot still cannot reach Telegram API from current VPS network

commands_for_fresh_verifier: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m py_compile src/telegram_bot.py src/services/telegram_lead_intake.py src/services/bot_feature_requests.py
ssh root@80.78.242.105 'cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose ps && curl -I http://localhost:8000'
ssh root@80.78.242.105 'cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U beautybot -d local -c "SELECT version_num FROM alembic_version;"'
ssh root@80.78.242.105 'cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U beautybot -d local -c "SELECT to_regclass(''public.botfeaturerequests'');"'

ssh root@80.78.242.105 'cd /opt/seo-app && PYTHONPATH=/opt/seo-app:/opt/seo-app/src runtime_bot/.venv/bin/python - <<'"'"'PY'"'"' from telegram_bot import _guest_welcome_text; print(_guest_welcome_text().splitlines()[0]); PY'
known_gaps: Current VPS still cannot reach Telegram Bot API, so polling/send remains blocked until VPN/proxy or a separate relay is enabled.
